fieldDetector.input: 416x416 NHWC RGB8 (BGR ImageNet mean/std applied in preprocess)
fieldDetector.output: [1,3598,62] anchor-major: 30 sigmoid class scores + 4x8 DFL logits
fieldDetector.exportedVia: litert-torch (PyTorch -> LiteRT/TFLite), sigmoid baked into cls
fieldDetector.note: Replaces the former AGPL-ambiguous YOLOv8n detector. Loaded in JS via react-native-fast-tflite; consumers pass it to useLicenseScanner ocrModelSources.
